title: Paragon on Hyperliquid: Trade Bitcoin Dominance
summary_title: Bitcoin dominance finally actionable: Paragon's 125-name index perps on Hyperliquid
summary_description: Paragon deploys crypto's most-charted but previously untradeable indices—BTC.D, Total 2, Others—as HIP3 perpetuals with institutional-grade oracles.

key_moments.label: Paragon introduced as new HIP3 deployer, live 12 hours ago
Taha explains genesis: Bitcoin dominance is the most-charted non-tradeable ticker in crypto
30-40% as many TradingView mentions as BTC or ETH; occupies mindshare but zero actionability
Three live tickers: BTC.D, Total 2 (top 125 ex-BTC), Others (top 125 ex-top 10)
125-name basket methodology; Bitcoin dominance = BTC market cap / top 125 total
Case study: BTC down 13%, Bitcoin dominance down <1%—removes single-name risk
Paragon self-funded 500K HLP; retains control during zero-to-one stage
Live on TreadFi, Pear Protocol, Based, BullPen, Silico; $5K cash prizes + points boost

pull_quote: Bitcoin dominance is the most charted, most discussed, widely tracked ticker in crypto—yet it remained completely non-actionable until now.
